character.definition: to plough; to till, black color
fierce; cruel, sudden, a scorching heat
name of a variety of grain, hollyhock; the mallow; root and flower can be used as medicine to neutralize poison; antipyretic (febrifuge)
(ancient form of 僕) a servant, a modest term referring to oneself
a kind of beast, a kind of mule
(same as 鮸) an ocean fish with long flat body, big mouth, sharp teeth (a cod, same as 鰵)
stone steps, stairs up a platform
a kind of spider with long legs
gift of money to help pay for a funeral
